title: Edible Rotten Flesh for Fabric
description: Turn your rotten flesh into a valuable resource with this simple mod! Smelt, smoke, or cook it for Cooked Rotten Flesh, perfect for surviving a zombie apocalypse.
body:
**Cooked Rotten Flesh Mod for Fabric**  
A simple mod that adds a new way to make use of all that rotten flesh! Now you can smelt rotten flesh in a furnace, smoke it, or cook it on a campfire to get **Cooked Rotten Flesh**. It’s safer to eat and offers better hunger restoration than raw rotten flesh, restoring 2.5 hunger bars—25% more than regular rotten flesh—and providing 1 saturation, 20% more. Perfect for survivalists, resourceful players, and anyone preparing for a zombie apocalypse! Don't let any resource go to waste when the world is overrun with zombies!
